event: Near Cape St. Johns, Coast of Labrador
description: A dramatic coastal landscape showing the rugged shore of Labrador near Cape St. Johns. In the foreground, a dark rocky beach with scattered boulders and a small beached boat stretches across the canvas. A few modest buildings of a coastal settlement cluster on the shoreline at left. In the middle distance, brilliant white icebergs glow against the dark headland, their sharp forms contrasting with the rolling green hillside. The sky is heavy with dark storm clouds that open at center to reveal a burst of warm golden light breaking through, illuminating the icebergs and the calm sea.

_meta.title: Near Cape St. Johns, Coast of Labrador
